channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ke Huy Quan and Jeff Cohen Have a “Goonies ”Reunion in L.A., Plus Michelle Yeoh, Mark Wahlberg and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Arrested on Morning of His 66th Birthday, Police Search His Homes in Sandringham and Windsor
item.description: A number of police cars were pictured at Wood Farm on King Charles' Sandringham estate on the morning of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's 66th birthday

item.title: Kate Middleton’s Penny Loafers Are a Sleek Upgrade from Ballet Flats and Sneakers — Get a Pair for Spring from $23
item.description: Who says cushy shoes can’t be cute?

item.title: Reward for Information About Savannah Guthrie's Missing Mom Nancy Increased to Over $200,000
item.description: An extensive search for Nancy Guthrie, 84, is now in its third week

item.title: Hailey Bieber Shares Rare Update on Her and Justin Bieber's Son Jack Blues, and Says She Wants More Kids
item.description: Hailey appeared on the latest episode of Jake Shane's 'Therapuss,' now airing on Netflix

item.title: Allergy Season Must-Haves on Amazon
item.description: TMZ may collect a share of sales or other compensation from links on this page. If you know springtime allergies are about to kick your ass ... then y...

item.title: Millie Bobby Brown Hot Shots To Slay Her 22nd Birthday!
item.description: We don't know about you, but Millie Bobby Brown is feelin' 22 ... and we've got her hot shots to prove it! From bikini slays to sexy pajama days, this...

item.title: Shia LaBeouf Raves About Church, Sex in Wild Clip Recorded Week Before Arrest
item.description: Shia LaBeouf might not be considering the priesthood ... but he does have some interesting ideas on how to bring people back to church ... one that wo...

item.title: Jeffrey Epstein's Ex-Assistant Scores Massage Table, Art in NASCAR Driver Divorce
item.description: Sarah Kellen -- one of the women authorities believe was part of Jeffrey Epstein’s inner circle -- got a massage table and several Israeli artifacts a...

item.title: Mark Wahlberg Says Drake Maye, Patriots Will Reach Super Bowl Next Year
item.description: Drake Maye and the New England Patriots won't have to wait long to get another crack at the Lombardi Trophy ... they'll be back next year for Super Bo...
